title: System settings
accessRequiredDescription: This page is limited to users with global administrator access.
smtpPasswordStored: A password is stored. Leave blank to keep it unchanged.

settings.registrationDescription: Disable this after bootstrap if accounts should be invite-only or operator-managed.
settings.verificationDescription: New non-admin registrations must confirm email before login. The first bootstrap admin is not blocked.
settings.webUrlHelper: Password reset and email verification links use this origin when set.
settings.clearPasswordDescription: This also overrides an environment fallback with no password.

account.disableDescription: {{email}} will no longer be able to sign in or access protected routes. A system administrator can re-enable this account later.
account.revokeAdminDescription: {{email}} will lose access to instance-level system settings. Project memberships are not changed.
account.passwordTooShort: Password must be at least 8 characters.
account.removePasswordDescription: {{email}} will only be able to sign in through a linked external identity. This is rejected if password is their last login method.
account.passwordRemovalError: Could not remove the user password.

data.title: Data tools
data.description: Exports include account, project, probe, check, alert, public status, result, and system setting data. Imported backups replace existing managed data.
data.invalidJson: The selected file is not valid JSON.
data.invalidExport: The selected file is not a Netstamp data export.
data.confirmImportDescription: Existing managed data will be replaced by this backup.
